title: Apigee API Proxy
description: Metadata about an API proxy in Apigee. API proxies act as facades for backend services, providing security, rate limiting, transformations, and other capabilities.

name.description: Output only. Name of the API proxy.

revision.description: Output only. List of revisions defined for the API proxy.

latestRevisionId.description: Output only. The ID of the most recently created revision.

labels.description: User-defined labels for organizing API proxies.

readOnly.description: Output only. Whether this proxy is read-only.

createdAt.description: Time the entity was created in milliseconds since epoch.

lastModifiedAt.description: Time the entity was last modified in milliseconds since epoch.
